meta.title: Ski & Snowboard Lessons in Chile | CDSKI — Valle Nevado, El Colorado, La Parva
meta.description: Ski and snowboard lessons for all levels at Valle Nevado, El Colorado, and La Parva. Expert instructors, all-inclusive packages, and guided snow experiences in the Chilean Andes.
meta.keywords: ski lessons Chile, snowboard classes Santiago, Valle Nevado lessons, El Colorado ski, La Parva snowboard, ski school Chile, ski instructor, learn to ski Chile

hero.title: Live the Mountain
hero.subtitle: Ski & Snowboard Lessons in the Chilean Andes
hero.description: Guided experiences with expert instructors at Valle Nevado, El Colorado, and La Parva. Your snow adventure starts here.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Personalized experiences for every level and style

groupSki.title: Group Ski Lessons
groupSki.description: Learn to ski in a group with expert instructors. Perfect for families and friends who want to share the experience on the best slopes in the Andes.

privateSnowboard.title: Private Snowboard Lessons
privateSnowboard.description: One-on-one personalized instruction to learn snowboard at your own pace. Guaranteed rapid progress with your dedicated instructor.

guidedExperience.title: Guided Snow Experience
guidedExperience.description: Personalized guide service at Chile's best ski resorts. Explore the mountains with a local expert who will show you the best routes.

kids.title: Kids Ski & Snowboard
kids.description: Specially designed lessons for the little ones. Fun and safe methodology so children enjoy their first experience in the snow. Children under 7 should check the ski school at each resort.

heliski.title: Heliski Chile
heliski.description: The ultimate experience for experts. Access untouched powder by helicopter and ski where no one has skied before in the Andes mountains.

corporate.title: Corporate Experiences
corporate.description: Organize an unforgettable snow day for your company or school. Mountain team building with complete logistics and personalized activities.

whyUs.title: Why Choose CDSKI?
whyUs.subtitle: Over a decade of experience taking international tourists to Chile's best slopes

reasons.title: Expert Instructors
reasons.description: Our team of professional instructors knows every corner of the mountains. You'll learn from the best.

reasons.title: Safety First
reasons.description: Strict safety protocols, top-quality equipment, and constant monitoring throughout the entire experience.

reasons.title: 3 Ski Resorts
reasons.description: Valle Nevado, El Colorado, and La Parva. Access to the best slopes in South America, just 46 km from Santiago.

reasons.title: Multilingual
reasons.description: Service in Spanish, English, and Portuguese. We specialize in welcoming tourists from around the world.

reasons.title: All-Inclusive
reasons.description: All-inclusive packages with equipment, tickets, and lessons. No surprises, no hidden costs.

reasons.title: Flexible Payment
reasons.description: Webpay, Mercado Pago, PayPal, and bank transfer. Pay however you prefer, securely.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your snow adventure

questions.q: Do I need prior experience to take lessons?
questions.a: Not at all! We have lessons for all levels, from absolute beginners to advanced. Our instructors adapt their teaching to your level.

questions.q: What do the all-inclusive packages include?
questions.a: All-inclusive packages include ski resort access ticket, complete equipment (ski or snowboard, boots, and poles), and a 2-hour lesson with a expert instructor.

questions.q: Which ski resorts do you operate at?
questions.a: We operate at Santiago's three main ski resorts: Valle Nevado (the largest in South America), El Colorado, and La Parva, all less than 50 km from Santiago.

questions.q: When is the ski season in Chile?
questions.a: The ski season in Chile runs from June to October. Peak season includes weekends, holidays, and winter vacation (usually the last week of June and the first week of July).

questions.q: Do you offer lessons in English and Portuguese?
questions.a: Yes! Our instructors speak Spanish, English, and Portuguese. We specialize in welcoming international tourists from the Americas, Europe, and Asia.
We accept Webpay Plus (Chilean and international debit/credit cards), Mercado Pago, PayPal, and bank transfer. Payment is 100% secure with instant confirmation.

questions.q: What age can children start taking lessons?
questions.a: Children can start skiing from age 7. We have instructors specialized in children's teaching with fun and safe methodology.

questions.q: What should I bring to my ski lesson?
questions.a: We recommend thermal layered clothing, waterproof gloves, hat, sunscreen, and sunglasses or goggles. Ski/snowboard equipment is included in our packages.
